loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current harmonic distortion (I-THD) and voltage unbalance as proxies for V-THD and individual harmonics, as specific V-THD and H5/H7 harmonic columns are not present in the asset's schema.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trends (I-THD) as per-phase voltage THD (V-THD) and harmonic order (H5/H7) data are not recorded for this meter.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing displacement PF as proxy for PF Gap — exact PF Gap metric not available in shared buffer.
